summary: Three MVP-gate blockers found: no TLS service in prod compose (G1), secrets in .env (G2), no cargo audit step and 5 CVSS≥7.0 advisories including 2 CVSS-9.0 critical in wasmtime 26 (G3). wasmtime 26→36.x upgrade is a new P0 blocker not present in p9 goals. Recommend planning order: G3 first (wasmtime upgrade unblocks audit gate), then G1 (TLS), then G2 (secrets), then G4/G5, then G6.
key_finding: wasmtime 26 carries CVSS-9.0 advisories (RUSTSEC-2026-0095, -0096) — upgrade to 36.x is required before cargo-audit CI gate can pass
new_open_questions: OQ-P10-4: wasmtime 36.x API migration scope in fke-runtime
